query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as total, 
       SUM(CASE WHEN tipo = 'seco' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as secos,
       SUM(CASE WHEN tipo = 'molhado' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as molhados
FROM insumos;
